ham.subject: Your recent transaction at ABC Mart – $45.00
ham.body:
Hello Customer,

We have processed your recent purchase at ABC Mart on 15 April 2026. Amount: $45.00. Transaction ID: TXN987654321.

If you did not authorize this transaction, please contact us immediately at 1-800-123-4567 or reply to this email.

Thank you for banking with SecureBank.

Sincerely,
SecureBank Customer Support

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Support Ticket #45789 – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Your IT support ticket #45789 has been escalated to Level 3. Our records indicate that your account has not been updated in 72 hours. To secure your access, please reset your password by clicking the link below within 24 hours.

<URL>

Failure to comply may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
